2.  testing package - testing - Go Packages
    To write a new test suite, create a file that contains the TestXxx functions as described here, and give that file a name ending in "_test.go". The file will be excluded from regular package builds but will be included when the "go test" command is run.
    pkg.go.dev/testing     2026-04-07T00:00:00.0000000
   
3.  : Testing - Go by Example
    Learn how to write and run unit tests for Go programs using the testing package and the go test command. See examples of basic, table-driven and benchmark tests for an integer minimum function.
    gobyexample.com/testing
   
4.  Comprehensive Guide to Testing in Go | The GoLand Blog
    Learn how to write and run unit tests, table-driven tests, benchmark tests, and fuzz tests in Go. This article covers the standard testing package, Testify library, and code coverage tools with examples and tips.
    blog.jetbrains.com/go/2022/11/22/comprehensive-guide-to-testing-in-go/
   
5.  Unit Testing in Go - A Beginner's Guide - freeCodeCamp.org
    In this article, we'll look at how unit testing works in Go in practice. We'll write a few small tests, run them from the command line, and cover the most common patterns you'll see in real Go codebases, such as table-driven tests and testing functions that return errors.
    www.freecodecamp.org/news/unit-testing-in-go-a-beginners-guide     2026-01-12T00:00:00.0000000

    www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/how-to-write-unit-tests-in-go-using-go-test-and-the-testing-package
   
7.  Testing and Benchmarking in Go - Twilio
    In this article, we explored how to implement testing and benchmarking in Golang. By leveraging the testing package and built-in benchmarking tools, you can ensure your code is both correct and efficient.

8.  Testing in Go (testing package) - DEV Community
    Go's built-in testing package provides a simple yet powerful framework for writing unit tests. It emphasizes readability and encourages a test-driven development (TDD) approach.

9.  A Gentle Introduction to Unit Testing in Go - Better Stack
    Discover unit testing in Go: Learn Go's testing framework, interpret results, fix failures, and analyze code coverage in this concise tutorial.
    betterstack.com/community/guides/testing/unit-testing-in-go/
   
10.  Add a test - The Go Programming Language
    Learn how to write and execute tests for your Go code using the testing package and the go test command. Follow the tutorial to create a test for the Hello function and see the output and errors.
    go.dev/doc/tutorial/add-a-test
   
11.  Go Unit Testing: A Complete Guide to Writing Reliable Tests
    Go's built-in testing package makes it straightforward to write and run tests, but knowing how to write effective tests can be challenging. This guide will walk you through everything you need to know about unit testing in Go, from basic concepts to advanced techniques.
    www.ceos3c.com/golang/go-unit-testing-a-complete-guide-to-writing-reliable-tests/     2025-01-27T00:00:00.0000000
